LSE-MS8-L4-1400P-MSMATH8-PPX-IMR-01 • MS Math Grade 8 • Slope and Linear Equations (y = mx + b)

The Rebuilding Record

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a boy and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why does the girl say the starting part is the most important?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Distinguish between what the girl describes (the starting amount and the monthly savings) and why she assigns greater significance to one over the other. Justify your choice by identifying which element reflects meaning to the speaker rather than numerical detail.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS 8.EE.B.6  |  MS Math Grade 8: Slope and Linear Equations (y = mx + b)
